title: Hit counter HUD
description: Counts the number of hits you have dealt and taken and displays it on the screen.
body:
# Hit counter
Hit counter is a client side mod that counts the number of hits that the player has taken and the number of this the player has dealt in a period of five seconds and displays these counts on the screen.

![Displayed on "Middle right"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/721c1ff678f9ff291d92d412f5300038df2db93e.png)

## Customization
This mod has a keybind (by default **H**) which when pressed cycles through eight preset positions:
1.  Top right
1.  Top left
1.  Top middle
1.  Bottom right
1.  Bottom left
1.  Above hotbar
1.  Middle right
1.  Middle right

For further information, please refer the Gallery of this mod.

### To report bugs please go to [this](https://github.com/Juteplant1/Juteplant-Mend-Hud/issues) page and report it there. 
  For easier accessibility and viewablity for the myself, I have decided to use my bug report page for my other mod for this one as well.
